name: Fishermen
input:
The first line contains one integer $n$ ($1 \le n \le 1000$) — the number of fishermen.
The second line contains $n$ integers $a_1, a_2, \dots, a_n$ ($1 \le a_i \le 10^6$).
output: Print one integer — the minimum possible value of $\sum\limits_{i=1}^{n} b_i$ you can obtain by choosing the order of fishermen optimally.
